name: wan-2.2-s2v
description: Generate a video from an audio clip and a reference image

audio.description: Audio file to synchronize the video with
audio.title: Audio

image.description: First frame image to start the video from
image.title: Image

interpolate.description: Whether to interpolate video to higher frame rate (25fps)
interpolate.title: Interpolate

num_frames_per_chunk.description: Number of frames per video chunk
num_frames_per_chunk.title: Num Frames Per Chunk

seed.description: Random seed. Leave blank for random
seed.title: Seed
